name: thon-judge
description: Shell-native Codex plugin for evidence-backed hackathon preliminary judging.

interface.shortDescription: Score hackathon submissions from repo evidence
interface.longDescription: Batch-judge hackathon submissions using JUDJE.md, harness case-study signals, public GitHub evidence, screenshot paths, and lobster-count penalties through Windows-compatible shell scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use $thon-judge:thon-judge to score a hackathon submissions batch and write an HTML one-pager
